titleStmt.title: SII 9.334: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 334. (A.R. No. 68-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB LYING ON THE RIGHT SIDE OF THE ENTRANCE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE BENAKAPPA TEMPLE AT ORUVAY, BELLARY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the cyclic year Īśvara, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 30, Śukravāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1217, August 4 Friday, with a solar eclipse. It belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa (II). Raṇadhavala Basavaṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka, who is described as the rescuer of Ballāḷa's suzerainty, is stated to have granted some land for the service of the god Vināyaka. Ēchaseṭṭi is stated to have granted the Vināyaka-sthāna to Chīlarāśi-guru, the disciple of Bhīmarāśi-guru; the sthala of Kaṁpile and the four Nāḍus made a gift of tolls on bullocks to Echaseṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpaca
kravartti hoysaḷa vīraballāḷadēvarājyasamu
ddhara basavaṇadaṇḍanāyakaguṇaprabhāvaveṁteṁda
ḍe . nuḍivaṁ satyavacōktiyaṁ sakaḷadharmmabyā
ptiyiṁdartthamaṁ paḍeva viprasurādiśiṣṭajana
tāsaṁtuṣṭiyāgalketā kuḍuvaṁ dravyamanī gu
ṇāśrayamumaṁ lōkaṁ babāppeṁbinaṁ paḍedaṁ sadguṇi
daṁḍanātha basavaṁ prakhyātiyaṁ kīrttiyaṁ . kaliyamṛtadaṁḍa
nāthara lalitātmajanendoḍoppuguṁ kalitanamuṁ sale satyā
mṛtavākyaṁ kulatiḷakaṁ basavadaṁḍanāthādhipanoḷ . śrīma
dīśvarasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa bahuḷa Amāvāsye śukravā
ra sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu śrīvināyakadēvarggā raṇadha
vaḷa basavacamūpaṁ dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa keyi teṁ
kavoladalli cikkaḍḍadāriyiṁ baḍagalibbaḍagalāgi hiri
yakōla ma 2 . Iṁtanitu hiriyakōla mattaru gaḷeŪra
piṁtaṇa tōṭa 1 Iṁtī vināyakadēvasthānamaṁ bhīmarāśigu
rugaḷa dīkṣeya magaṁ cīlarāśigurugeḷge dēvabrāhmaṇa
pādārādhakanappa baliyēcaseṭṭi dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi cīlarā
śige koṭṭanu kuṟugōḍa kaṁpileya sthaḷavuṁ nālkunāḍuṁ Etti
naśāsanavaṁ Ēcaseṭṭige mānyaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.334 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
